title: The Frequency Domain View of a Stationary Time Series
description: A visual explanation of how a stationary time series can be decomposed into its constituent sine waves, showing the connection between the time domain, the autocovariance function, and the spectral density function.
relationships: The ACF measures the internal structure (memory) of the time series
The Spectral Density Function is the Fourier Transform of the ACF
The Spectral Density shows the contribution (Power) of each frequency component to the total variance of the series
